prompt: What is the average number of modules per subscription and average subscription value, broken down by engagement tier (standard, silver, gold)? Which tier has the deepest average analytics portfolio?
output:
| tier | avg_modules_per_subscription | avg_subscription_value |
|------|------------------------------|------------------------|
| gold | 2.2857142857142856 | 42839.28571428572 |
| silver | 2.439252336448598 | 47385.51401869159 |
| standard | 2.4966887417218544 | 47786.4238410596 |

The standard tier has the deepest average analytics portfolio (2.4966887417218544 modules per subscription).
